args: let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d).on("end",()=>{try{const f=(JSON.parse(s).tool_input||{}).file_path||"";if(/\.(md|mjs|js|rs|html|css)$/i.test(f)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Lore coding & doc standards apply to this file (see the lore-coding-doc-standards memory) — apply them to pre-existing code you touch, not just new code. Code: JSDoc on every function (what/preconditions/args); typed, user-readable errors; structured logging, never log secrets; no section-grouping or self-evident comments. Docs: Diataxis, one H1, sentence-case headings, em dash with surrounding spaces, inline code (not bold) for code/paths/vars; banned words — drop simply/just/easily, allow/let->can/use, e.g./i.e./etc.->spell out, &->and, whitelist/blacklist->allowlist/denylist, no click-here links. Document new HTTP endpoints in docs/reference/http-api.md."}}))}}catch(e){}})
